name: RevengeHotels
brief: Summer-2025 campaigns against Brazilian and Spanish-speaking hotels in which a significant portion of the initial-infector and downloader code appears LLM-generated (clean structure, placeholder variables, verbose per-action comments), delivering VenomRAT (HVNC, stealer, reverse proxy, UAC bypass). *Analyst note: LLM authorship inferred from code style, not captured model logs.* Kaspersky
ttpMd:
**LLM-enhanced scripting techniques** T1059 - Command and Scripting Interpreter

**LLM-aided development** T1587.001 - Develop Capabilities: Malware

T1566.001 - Spearphishing Attachment
